title: All 22 AlphaFold3 jobs at a glance
lede: Every AlphaFold3 job that bears on the Mini-STRC → Ultra-Mini construct, ordered by role in the argument. Baseline fold → boundary sweep → partner screen → homodimer check → Ultra-Mini gating. Each row links to the section where the result is interpreted (3D viewers for the 16 primary jobs are in the Appendix at the bottom).
block_fold: Baseline fold and mutation control (4 jobs)
block_boundary: Truncation boundary sweep and clinical candidates (7 jobs)
v_fold_intact: fold intact — mutation is chemical, not structural
v_folds_better: folds better than full protein (7 % disord)
v_sp_ok: SP prepend does not break the fold
v_gate1b: Gate 1 · no regression vs full STRC
footer: One additional AF3 job (NFATC1 + Calcineurin A/B, ipTM 0.73) belongs to the parallel sonogenetic hypothesis and is excluded from this table. Total Mini-STRC-relevant jobs: 22. Section column (§n) refers to the numbered section that interprets that job.
